title: Tobacco Plain Packaging - Canada.ca
content:
## Tobacco Plain Packaging
With described video

## Transcript - Tobacco Plain Packaging
Text on screen:  The government of Canada is taking the next step in tobacco control.
Text on screen: Plain and standardized packaging for tobacco products
Images of cigarettes, cigars and tobacco in plain brown packaging with warning labels generic white font appear on screen.
Text on screen: We want to hear from you. To share your comments visit: Canada.ca/health
A message from Health Canada and the Government of Canada.
